title: Implement product inventory search with full-text filtering
description:
As a warehouse manager, I need to search the product inventory by name, SKU, or category so that I can quickly locate items for order fulfillment.

Details:

  • Search should support partial string matching
  • Results should be paginated (20 items per page)
  • Filter by category, price range, and stock status
  • Response time must be under 200ms for up to 10,000 products
acceptanceCriteria:
• Search returns results within 200ms
  • Partial name matching works (e.g., 'lap' finds 'Laptop')
  • Filters can be combined (category AND price range)
  • Empty search returns all products (paginated)

title: Add real-time stock level notifications for low inventory
description:
As a procurement specialist, I want to receive notifications when product stock levels fall below configurable thresholds so that I can initiate reorder workflows before stockouts occur.

Technical requirements:

  • WebSocket-based real-time notification system
  • Configurable threshold per product category
  • Email digest option for non-real-time users
  • Integration with existing procurement dashboard
acceptanceCriteria:
• Notifications trigger within 30 seconds of stock falling below threshold
  • Thresholds configurable per product and per category
  • Email digest sends at configurable interval (default: daily)

title: Create supplier management module with order tracking
description:
As a supply chain manager, I need to manage supplier information and track purchase orders so that I can monitor delivery timelines and supplier performance metrics.

Required features:

  • CRUD operations for supplier profiles
  • Purchase order creation with line items
  • Order status tracking (pending, confirmed, shipped, received)
  • Supplier performance dashboard (on-time delivery %, quality score)
acceptanceCriteria:
• Supplier profile contains: name, contact, lead time, minimum order, payment terms
  • Purchase orders link to existing products
  • Status transitions are logged with timestamps

title: Implement barcode scanning for warehouse receiving
description:
As a warehouse operator, I need to scan product barcodes during the receiving process so that I can quickly update inventory counts and verify shipment contents against purchase orders.

Scope:

  • Support EAN-13 and UPC-A barcode formats
  • Mobile-friendly web interface using camera API
  • Batch scanning mode for high-volume receiving
  • Automatic quantity adjustment on scan

title: Design REST API rate limiting and authentication middleware
description:
As a platform engineer, I need to implement API rate limiting and token-based authentication so that the inventory API is protected against abuse and unauthorized access.

Requirements:

  • JWT-based authentication with refresh tokens
  • Rate limiting: 100 requests/minute for standard users, 1000 for admin
  • API key management for third-party integrations
  • Audit logging of all authentication events
acceptanceCriteria:
• JWT tokens expire after 15 minutes
  • Refresh tokens valid for 7 days
  • Rate limit returns HTTP 429 with Retry-After header
  • All auth events logged with IP, user agent, timestamp

title: Product price calculation returns incorrect values for bulk discount tiers
description:
Reproduction Steps:

  1. Navigate to Products > Pricing
  2. Select product 'Industrial Ethernet Switch' (SKU: TT-NET-4821)
  3. Add to cart with quantity 150 (bulk tier 3: 10% discount)
  4. Observe the calculated unit price

Expected: Unit price should be $89.10 (10% off $99.00)

Actual: Unit price shows $94.05 (5% discount applied instead of 10%)

Root cause investigation: The discount tier lookup uses < instead of <= comparison, so exactly 150 units falls into tier 2 instead of tier 3.

Impact: Affects all orders at exact tier boundaries. Estimated revenue impact: $12,400/month based on order history analysis.

title: API returns 500 error when filtering products with special characters in category name
description:
Reproduction Steps:

  1. Send GET request: /api/v1/products?category=Electronics%20%26%20Components
  2. Observe HTTP 500 response

Expected: Returns products in the 'Electronics & Components' category

Actual: HTTP 500 Internal Server Error with stack trace showing unescaped SQL parameter

Stack trace excerpt:

sqlalchemy.exc.ProgrammingError: (psycopg2.errors.SyntaxError)
ERROR: syntax error at or near "Components"
LINE 1: ...WHERE products.category = 'Electronics & Components'...

Severity: High - potential SQL injection vector. Category names with ampersands, quotes, or backslashes trigger the same error.

title: Inventory count becomes negative after concurrent stock deduction requests
description:
Reproduction Steps:

  1. Set product 'Wireless Mouse' (SKU: TT-ACC-1092) stock to 5
  2. Send 10 simultaneous POST requests to /api/v1/inventory/deduct with quantity=1
  3. Check resulting stock level

Expected: Stock level should be 0, with 5 requests succeeding and 5 returning HTTP 409 Conflict

Actual: Stock level is -5. All 10 requests succeed because there is no row-level locking or optimistic concurrency check.

Impact: Overselling occurs during high-traffic periods. 23 incidents logged in past 30 days.

title: Dashboard chart renders blank when date range exceeds 90 days
description:
Reproduction Steps:

  1. Navigate to Analytics > Sales Dashboard
  2. Set date range to Jan 1, 2025 - Dec 31, 2025 (365 days)
  3. Click 'Apply Filter'

Expected: Line chart displays monthly aggregated sales data

Actual: Chart area is blank. Browser console shows: 'Error: Maximum data points exceeded (limit: 90)'

Workaround: Users must select date ranges of 90 days or less, which prevents quarterly and annual reporting.

title: Set up PostgreSQL database migration scripts for v2.0 schema changes
description:
Create Alembic migration scripts for the following schema changes:

  • Add 'supplier_id' foreign key to products table
  • Create 'suppliers' table with performance metrics columns
  • Add 'barcode' column to products (nullable, unique index)
  • Create 'stock_notifications' table for threshold alerts
  • Add composite index on (category, price) for search optimization

Ensure migrations are reversible and include data backfill for existing records.

title: Configure CI/CD pipeline for automated testing and staging deployment
description:
Set up Azure Pipelines YAML configuration:

  • Trigger on push to main and feature/* branches
  • Run pytest suite with coverage report (minimum 80%)
  • Run ESLint and Black formatter checks
  • Build Docker image and push to Azure Container Registry
  • Deploy to staging environment on successful main branch build
  • Add Slack notification on build failure

title: Write integration tests for inventory deduction API endpoint
description:
Create comprehensive integration tests for the /api/v1/inventory/deduct endpoint:

  • Test successful single deduction
  • Test deduction exceeding available stock (expect 409)
  • Test concurrent deductions using threading (race condition)
  • Test deduction with invalid product ID (expect 404)
  • Test deduction with negative quantity (expect 400)
  • Test deduction with zero quantity (expect 400)
  • Test authenticated vs unauthenticated requests

Use pytest fixtures with test database isolation.

title: Build product import/export functionality for CSV and Excel formats
description:
As a catalog manager, I need to bulk import and export product data using CSV and Excel files so that I can efficiently manage large product catalogs without manual data entry.

Requirements:

  • Import: CSV and XLSX file upload with validation
  • Export: Download current product catalog as CSV or XLSX
  • Validation: Check required fields, data types, duplicate SKUs
  • Error reporting: Row-level error details in import response
  • Limit: Support up to 50,000 products per import

title: Add multi-warehouse support with transfer order management
description:
As a logistics coordinator, I need to manage inventory across multiple warehouse locations and create transfer orders between them so that I can optimize stock distribution based on regional demand.

Requirements:

  • Warehouse CRUD with location metadata (address, capacity, zone)
  • Per-warehouse stock levels for each product
  • Transfer order creation with approval workflow
  • Transit tracking with estimated delivery dates
  • Dashboard view showing stock distribution across warehouses

title: Implement Redis caching layer for frequently accessed product data
description:
Add Redis caching to reduce database load for read-heavy product endpoints:

  • Cache product detail responses (TTL: 5 minutes)
  • Cache category listing responses (TTL: 15 minutes)
  • Cache search results for common queries (TTL: 2 minutes)
  • Implement cache invalidation on product updates
  • Add cache hit/miss metrics to monitoring dashboard

Expected outcome: 60% reduction in database read queries for product endpoints.
